title: La foule hurle
writer: John Bright, Niven Busch, Kubec Glasmon
actors: Jean Gabin, Hélène Perdrière, Francine Mussey
plot: Simultaneously shot French language version of The Crowd Roars: A race car driver vies with his younger brother, who he'd hoped to keep away from the track, both in competition and for a girl who hangs out with the men. Tragedy re...
